chrome-devtools.name: chrome-devtools
args:
open -na "/Applications/Google Chrome.app" --args --remote-debugging-port=9222 --user-data-dir="$PWD/.vscode/.mcp-chrome-user-data-$(date +%s)-$$" --no-first-run --no-default-browser-check &

# give Chrome a moment to start its remote debugging socket
sleep 1

# start chrome-devtools-mcp attached to the same debugging port and write logs to /tmp
pnpm exec -- chrome-devtools-mcp --slim --no-usage-statistics --remote-debugging-port=9222 --logFile "/tmp/chrome-devtools-mcp.auto.log"
